image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_props: prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: story_clue, must remain visually consistent.
image_prompt_shot: shot S040. camera intent: comic_panel_08. action beats: 母亲抬眼，却先看向他身后，像看见真正的儿子。; 林澈低声说：别听他说，小澈。. narration intent: 旁白 explains "母亲抬眼，却先看向他身后，像看见真正的儿子。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "别听他说，小澈。". continuity locks: charA_v1 (location: hidden_basement_and_kitchen, pose: listening); mug_red_v1 (location: near_main_character, state: broken_or_remembered). shot positive notes: cinematic realistic suspense comic panel, stable young Chinese man identity, rainy old apartment, red mug as recurring clue, coherent low-cost storyboard frame.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: story_clue, must remain visually consistent. shot S040. camera intent: comic_panel_08. action beats: 母亲抬眼，却先看向他身后，像看见真正的儿子。; 林澈低声说：别听他说，小澈。. narration intent: 旁白 explains "母亲抬眼，却先看向他身后，像看见真正的儿子。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "别听他说，小澈。". continuity locks: charA_v1 (location: hidden_basement_and_kitchen, pose: listening); mug_red_v1 (location: near_main_character, state: broken_or_remembered). shot positive notes: cinematic realistic suspense comic panel, stable young Chinese man identity, rainy old apartment, red mug as recurring clue, coherent low-cost storyboard frame.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, text artifacts, logo, watermark, extra fingers, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, subtitles burned into image
continuity_notes: continuity locks: charA_v1 (location: hidden_basement_and_kitchen, pose: listening); mug_red_v1 (location: near_main_character, state: broken_or_remembered)
